summary: Iteration 83 - Tested new features: Online platform sales fix (verified), Advanced PDF exports with branding, VirtualizedTable integration, Quick Help button. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

issues: Hydration warnings: span elements inside table structures - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Online platform sales are correctly calculated in dashboard stats (online_sales: 5525.875)
Branding Settings page fully functional with logo upload, company info fields, color picker
PDF exports working for sales, expenses, pnl report types with branded headers
VirtualizedTable successfully integrated into Sales, Expenses, Stock pages
Quick Help button appears on all pages with page-specific tours
Keyboard shortcuts tab displays comprehensive navigation shortcuts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 83 fully tested and working. VirtualizedTable has minor hydration warnings but functions correctly. Branding page at /branding with logo upload. PDF exports at /api/pdf-exports/generate.

online_platform_sales_fix.dashboard_stats_online_sales: 5525.875 SAR (correctly calculated from payment_details with mode=online_platform)
online_platform_sales_fix.sales_page: Shows online platform sales with sale_type=Online_platform badges

elements.live_preview_card: Shows company name, address, contact info with logo
elements.logo_upload: Upload/Change Logo button with file input
elements.company_info_form: Company Name, VAT Number, Address, Phone, Email fields
elements.color_picker: Primary color input with color picker and hex input
elements.preview_pdf_button: Opens sample P&L PDF in new tab

pdf_exports_api.POST_generate: Generates branded PDF for sales, expenses, pnl, supplier_statement

quick_help_button.location: Fixed position, bottom right, green circular button

features.page_tour_tab: Page-specific tour with steps and navigation

pdf_export_buttons.sales_page: Branded PDF button visible and working
pdf_export_buttons.expenses_page: Branded PDF button visible and working

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend calls. PDF generation uses reportlab library.
